login.title: Sign in to AgriVision
login.subtitle: Community features and profile sync use Clerk.

hero.title: One workspace for plant health, weather, and inputs
hero.subtitle: Diagnose leaves, read field-ready weather, and tune fertilizer—all with a calm interface built for quick checks between rows.

benefits.local: Disease checks saved locally in your browser
benefits.weather: Weather tuned to your field or search
benefits.guidance: Outputs are guidance—verify with local experts

home.coreToolsHint: Jump in where your day needs clarity first.

disease.title: Disease detection
disease.desc: Upload a leaf photo for EfficientNet-based diagnosis with care-oriented suggestions.

weather.title: Weather lens
weather.desc: Current conditions, agronomic signals, alerts, and a 3-day outlook with GDD context.

fertilizer.title: Fertilizer guide
fertilizer.desc: Combine soil tests, crop type, moisture, and live weather for tailored recommendations.

how.title: How it fits together
how.subtitle: Each tool stands alone; combine them when you want the fuller picture for a plot or season.
how.step1Body: Add a leaf image, allow location, or enter soil and crop details.
how.step2Body: Models and weather APIs return labels, cues, and text you can act on.
how.step3Body: Cross-check with extension, labels, and your own scouting before big calls.

plants.title: Plant profiles
plants.desc: Quick crop reference for water, light, and pH.

disclaimer.line2: AgriVision is informational—always validate high-stakes decisions with qualified support.

dashboard.title: Farm dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Disease check history, simple risk cues, and charts. Synced across your devices when signed in.
dashboard.locationUnset: No saved coordinates yet — open Weather to set your field location.
dashboard.footnote: Risk levels are heuristic rules on your saved history, not field predictions. Always verify with scouting and experts.

flags.repeatPattern: Similar non-healthy labels appeared more than once in the last 7 days.
flags.lowConfidence: Some recent non-healthy results had low model confidence — rescan with a clearer leaf photo if unsure.

resources.title: Resource management
resources.subtitle: Ideas to reduce water waste, schedule nutrients with weather, and trim input cost while protecting yield.

water.title: Smarter water use
water.body: Pair irrigation with weather (rain ahead, ET cues) and soil moisture. Use the Weather lens for timing.

fertilizer.title: Fertilizer scheduling
fertilizer.body: Combine soil type, moisture, crop, and current temperature or humidity from the Fertilizer guide.

cost.title: Input cost focus
cost.body: Track what the model flags on the dashboard and avoid repeat sprays or extra inputs without a soil or tissue check.

schedule.title: Simple rotation to try
schedule.s1: Monday: review weather + 3-day outlook before irrigating.
schedule.s2: After rain: delay N top-dress until you can incorporate or as per local split schedule.
schedule.s3: Monthly: export or screenshot dashboard history when talking to your extension agent.

schemes.title: Government schemes & support (India)
schemes.subtitle: Direct links to official portals. Eligibility, amounts, and timelines change—always verify the current rules on the source site below.
schemes.disclaimer: AgriVision is not affiliated with the Government of India. Information is for orientation only.

pmkisan.name: PM-KISAN
pmkisan.summary: Income support of ₹6,000 per year (in three instalments) to eligible landholding farmer families. Manage registration, eKYC, and payment status on the official portal.

kcc.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
kcc.summary: Short-term crop loans with simplified procedures via banks. RBI master direction explains coverage for crop production, allied activities, and post-harvest needs.

soilhealth.name: Soil Health Card
soilhealth.summary: Soil testing scheme issuing crop-wise nutrient recommendations. Use the portal to find sample collection centres and download cards for your khasra/plot.

enam.name: eNAM (electronic National Agriculture Market)
enam.summary: Online trading platform integrating mandis (APMCs) so you can compare prices and reach more buyers. Register through your nearest integrated mandi.

icarAwd.name: ICAR — Alternate Wetting & Drying (AWD) for rice
icarAwd.summary: Water-saving irrigation practice for paddy validated by ICAR-IIRR: significant water savings without yield loss when scheduled correctly.

market.title: Mandi & wholesale snapshot (India)
market.subtitle: We map your point to a state and district, then show wholesale-style prices or reference bands. Cross-check the mandi board, APMC notice, and official portals before you trade.
market.indiaOnly: This tool is designed only for points inside India.
market.searchIntro: Search for a place in India, or use session coordinates from the
market.searchPlaceholder: e.g. Dadri, Gautam Buddha Nagar or Bengaluru
market.searchFailed: Search failed. Try a different spelling.
market.noSearchHits: No results — try a district, town, or pin code name.
market.locationHelp: We read latitude and longitude from the Weather page (session) or your device. Open
market.noCoords: Set a place: use Search above, or “Use weather location” / GPS.
market.toastNoSavedHint: Open the Weather page once so we can store lat/lon in this browser session.
market.geoUnsupported: Geolocation is not available in this browser.
market.geoFail: Could not read GPS. Check permissions and try again.
market.ogdHint: Live data uses data.gov.in “Variety-wise Daily Market Prices” when DATA_GOV_IN_API_KEY and DATA_GOV_IN_MANDI_RESOURCE are set in the server .env. If you see no rows, add your keys from data.gov.in, then restart the API server.
market.unitNote: Prices are shown as ₹/Quintal when the source uses wholesale units. Modal is the most traded class in the published row; min/max are the reported band.
market.disclaimer: This page does not provide buy/sell advice. Commodity law, taxes, and quality deductions vary. Use Agmarknet, e-NAM, and your local APMC for enforceable terms. OGD data depends on the dataset you configure; indicative mode uses static reference ranges for UX only.

chat.title: Farm assistant (AI)
chat.welcome: Ask about crop care, water timing, or where to read official scheme rules. I will keep answers short and safety-conscious.
chat.error: Could not reach the assistant. Check that the API is running and try again.
chat.signInRequired: Sign in to use the AI assistant. This protects the service for everyone.
chat.tokenWait: Session is still loading. Wait a second and try again, or refresh the page.
chat.sessionNotVerified: The server could not verify your session token. Ensure CLERK_SECRET_KEY is in the project root .env (same secret key as in the Clerk dashboard), restart the API, and try again. If it still fails, check the API terminal for Clerk errors.
chat.rateLimited: Too many messages. Please wait a bit before trying again.

voice.unsupported: Voice is not supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge on desktop or Android.
voice.micDenied: Microphone access was blocked. Allow it in browser settings to use voice input.
voice.noSpeech: I did not catch that—try speaking again.

crop.title: Crop picker
crop.subtitle: Pick the crops most likely to thrive on your field. Combines your soil, climate and the upcoming season.

result.title: Top picks
result.disclaimer: Suggestions are guidance based on standard ranges; verify with local extension officers and seed dealers before sowing.

errors.requestFailed: Could not reach the server. Try again in a moment.

yield.title: Yield estimate
yield.subtitle: Estimate per-hectare yield and total harvest from crop, soil, fertilizer applied, climate and irrigation.

hints.rainfall: Total expected rainfall during the crop season

result.title: Estimated harvest
result.disclaimer: Estimates are guidance based on standard regional baselines and adjustment factors. Actual yield depends on variety, pest pressure, soil depth, sowing window, and other field-specific factors.

errors.areaPositive: Area must be greater than zero.
errors.requestFailed: Could not reach the server. Try again in a moment.

fields.title: My fields
fields.subtitle: Keep a journal of your plots — name, area, soil, current crop, sowing date, GPS pin and notes.
fields.empty: No fields saved yet. Add your first plot to start tracking.
fields.signInRequired: Sign in to save and track your fields.

placeholder.notes: Anything you want to remember about this field

errors.name: Give the field a name.
errors.area: Enter a valid area (zero or greater).

history.title: Activity history
history.subtitle: Every disease scan, crop pick, yield estimate, fertilizer recommendation, crop calendar, irrigation advice and chat exchange you run while signed in is saved here.
history.signInRequired: Sign in to see your saved activity.
history.empty: Nothing saved yet. Run a disease scan, crop pick, yield estimate, fertilizer recommendation, crop calendar, irrigation schedule or farm chat to start your history.
history.clearConfirm: Delete all {{count}} entries from this view? This cannot be undone.

calendar.title: Crop calendar
calendar.subtitle: Pick a crop and your sowing date — we lay out every growth stage with its target dates and the activities to do in each.

irrigation.title: Smart irrigation advisor
irrigation.subtitle: Crop + stage + soil + today's weather → today's water depth, volume to apply for your area, and how many days until the next irrigation.
